# debian Provider

The Debian provider manages resources on remote Debian hosts over SSH.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "debian" {
  private_key = file("~/.ssh/id_ed25519")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) Default SSH private key used to authenticate when a resource's `ssh` block does not specify `private_key`, `public_key`, or `password`.
- `private_keys` (Map of String, Sensitive) A map of SSH public keys to their corresponding private keys. Resources can reference a public key in their `ssh` block to look up the private key for authentication.
